hooks.command: if command -v mappamind >/dev/null 2>&1; then mappamind snapshot "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; else echo "mappamind not found on PATH: run 'npm i -g mappamind' or remove this hook" >&2; fi

if command -v mappamind >/dev/null 2>&1; then mappamind shift "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" --host claude; else echo "mappamind not found on PATH: run 'npm i -g mappamind' or remove this hook" >&2; fi
